title: Add rewrite mode to arc-sync injection prompt
summary: When arc-sync detects injection mode, offer a rewrite option that re-homes content into ARC:/TEMPER: managed sections.

brief.problem: Users who already have an existing README are blocked from using arc-sync injection mode because there is no rewrite path available to migrate their existing content into managed sections.
brief.proposed_solution: Extend arc-sync with a rewrite option that holistically reads the existing README and re-homes its content into ARC:/TEMPER: managed sections.
success_criteria: arc-sync detects an existing README without ARC: markers and offers the rewrite option
Rewrite mode produces a README with all content inside ARC:/TEMPER: sections
Existing content is preserved without data loss during the rewrite
constraints: Must not modify files outside the target README
assumptions: Users running rewrite mode have reviewed their existing README and accept potential reformatting
